title: Salter One Cup Coffee Maker – Brew & Go Filter Coffee Machine, Includes 420ml Stainless Steel Travel Mug, Suitable For Ground Coffee/Pads, Washable & Reusable Filter, Brew Coffee In 3-4 Minutes
features: QUICK BREWING TIME: The Salter Brew & Go Coffee Maker makes a single cup of coffee in just 3-4 minutes, making it ideal for those who need a quick caffeine fix or for the hectic morning commute! Simply dispense into the travel mug, grab and go!

EASY OPERATION: Just add your favourite ground coffee or coffee pad into the reusable and washable filter. Make sure there is enough water in the tank and push the button to prepare barista-style coffee at home and on-the-go!

TRAVEL-MUG INCLUDED: Take your fresh brew wherever you go with the included stainless steel travel mug. Its 420ml capacity is perfect for holding just the right amount of coffee to keep you energised throughout your busy day.
REUSABLE FILTER: The removable and washable filter allows you to save money on paper coffee liners and reduces waste, what’s not to love!
COMPACT STORAGE: Measuring just 17.5l x 13w x 24.5h cm, this coffee machine is compact to easily store away in the cupboard or keep out on your countertop.
description: Product Description Designed for those needing a quick pick-me-up in the morning and throughout the day, this filter coffee machine brews a single cup in 3-4 minutes. Simply add your favourite ground coffee or coffee pad to the reusable filter and use the one-touch button to start brewing! Ideal for the daily morning commute, a 420ml stainless steel travel mug is included so you can drink on the go! Previous page Next page 1 Quick Brewing 2 Travel Mug Included 3 Reusable Filter
